Bitmap data and definitions for display resources, and driver implementation for the Sharp LS013B7DH01 display.

## Folders
- **[resources](resources/README.md)**: Bitmap data and definitions for display resources, including images and hexadecimal digits in XBM format.

## Files
- **[sharp_ls013b7dh01.c](sharp_ls013b7dh01.c.md)**: Driver implementation for the Sharp LS013B7DH01 display, including initialization, drawing, and error handling functions.
